page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c56g1.14xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor. It features 56 dedicated physical cores running at 2.9 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, with 1 thread per core. The system is equipped with 346.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 6.18 GB of RAM per core. Graphics and parallel computing acceleration are delivered via a single NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPU with 24 GB of dedicated VRAM. This instance does not include local storage and relies on network-attached storage, operating on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Benchmark results highlight strong performance in cryptographic and multi-threaded decompression tasks. The server achieved a Passmark CPU score of 51481.37 and an encryption test score of 47417.11, both placing in the top 25% tier. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression reached 262.06 GB/sec, also showing strong performance. In LLM inference benchmarks, the instance demonstrated top-tier performance using the NVIDIA A10 GPU, processing 9738.91 tokens/sec for prompt processing on a small 135M model and 2464.01 tokens/sec on a medium 7B model.

From a resource density perspective, the instance offers a balanced allocation of dedicated CPU cores and system memory alongside a mid-range enterprise GPU. The lack of local NVMe storage represents a tradeoff, requiring users to provision external block storage for data-heavy operations, which may introduce network latency overhead. However, the dedicated core allocation ensures predictable CPU performance without virtualization-induced noisy neighbor effects, making it a qualitatively cost-effective choice for workloads that require steady-state GPU and CPU compute without massive local storage requirements.

This server configuration is highly suited for deep learning inference, medium-scale LLM deployment, and parallel computing tasks that leverage CUDA acceleration. It is also well-suited for cryptographic processing, database operations, and multi-threaded data decompression pipelines that benefit from the dedicated Intel Xeon cores and high memory bandwidth.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c56g1.14xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance designed for compute-intensive and AI inference workloads. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor with 56 dedicated physical cores running at 2.9 GHz, it features 346.0 GB of RAM and a single NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPU with 24 GB of VRAM. The instance operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps and contains no local storage. Benchmark data shows strong performance in multi-threaded decompression, database operations, and cryptography, alongside top-tier LLM inference speeds for small and medium models. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for AI inference, parallel computing, cryptographic processing, and database workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources and GPU acceleration without the need for local NVMe storage.
